overview.title: General info
lines: Drone Viktor is listed around S-tier as 4-Cost Fast 8.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Must have Psionic Drone for Viktor. Best played with Bronze 4 Life augment since you have many active traits, but not mandatory. Nami / Lulu take leftover AP and utility items. Often you will be contested so level to 8 and play for 2* only -> aim for Top 4.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Ideally open with Viktor with Drone or a strong AP opener. Look for an econ engine: Timebreaker > Arbiter > Primordian. Slam items for Viktor.
Stage 3: If lose streaking, level to 7 at 3-5 and roll for 2* item holders. Win last two fights of Stage and econ up. If win streaking, you can aim to Level 7 end of Stage.

overview.title: General info
lines: Fateweaver Reroll is listed around S-tier as 1-Cost Reroll.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Best on Medallion > Serpent = Boar > Altar > Fountain = Mountain > Huntress. Always tank Jax even if you have Jax 2 + Aatrox 3. 4 Fateweaver is a consideration if carrying Caitlyn and not Talon.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Don't level early at all. Play around early Twisted Fate with AP items. Focus on Twisted + Jax items. If you have excess items early, put them on Cait / Talon.
Stage 3: Slow roll above 50g for 3*. Prioritize Twisted Fate > Jax > Caitlyn / Talon > Aatrox as the priority for 3*. Jax 2 is often better than Aatrox 3.

overview.title: Levelling guide
lines: Stay level 5 through 3-1 - slow roll above 50 gold

early.title: Early Game Plan
lines: Don't level early at all. Play around early Twisted Fate with AP items. Focus on Twisted + Jax items. If you have excess items early, put them on Cait / Talon.

mid.title: Mid Game Plan
lines: Slow roll above 50g for 3*. Prioritize Twisted Fate > Jax > Caitlyn / Talon > Aatrox as the priority for 3*. Jax 2 is often better than Aatrox 3.

late.title: Additional comp tips
lines: Finish your 3* then level for traits relevant (4 Fateweaver > Rhaast / Gwen > Stargazers if relevant). Corki 2 is often better than Cait 3 but he needs different items.
Best on Medallion > Serpent = Boar > Altar > Fountain = Mountain > Huntress. Always tank Jax even if you have Jax 2 + Aatrox 3. 4 Fateweaver is a consideration if carrying Caitlyn and not Talon.

overview.title: General info
lines: Space Groove is listed around S-tier as 4-Cost Fast 8.
Key item or condition: Space Groove Emblem.

overview.title: When to make
lines: S tier Space Groove Emblem only. Space Groove emblem = cut Nasus for Nunu. Leftover items on Riven. Use Blitzcrank to displace the enemy primary tank so Riven can potentially wrap backline. Can also primary tank Ornn.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Play around upgraded Teemo and Nasus opener. Slam items on Teemo for Nami. Tank items on Nasus are also important.
Stage 3: Add more Space Groove as you get them. Mix in Vanguards, Shepherd, Dark Star, as needed. Save econ and get ready for level 8 rolldown.

overview.title: Levelling guide
lines: Level 8 at 4-2 - roll for core board

early.title: Early Game Plan

mid.title: Mid Game Plan
lines: Add more Space Groove as you get them. Mix in Vanguards, Shepherd, Dark Star, as needed. Save econ and get ready for level 8 rolldown.

late.title: Additional comp tips
lines: Level to 8 and roll down for Nami 2, Riven, and 5 Space Groove. Look for either Kench 2 (best) or Rammus 2 or Nunu 2 as your frontline.

overview.title: General info
lines: Stargazer Xayah is listed around S-tier as Fast 9.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Only S tier with Boar and Serpent Stargazers. Altar and Mountain are A tier if you have them on 2-1. Medallion is C tier. Fountain is completely unplayable.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Play for win streak, ideally with Timebreaker but that will be rare because units are weaker on average. Slam items aggressively.
Stage 3: If win streaking, prioritize playing strongest board over greeding econ traits. Upgraded 2 and 3 costs are often better than 1* high tier units here.

lines: Roll for Xayah and Nunu 2. Play Samira with Rhaast before you find Jhin to help you go 9. Rammus isn't that good without bard so he's a lower prio upgrade.

Play from Highroll Nova spots with early Graves. Graves build: Power Frame -> Coolant -> Coolant+ -> Void Coefficient -> Tankbuster -> AP Rounds -> AP Rounds+. If you go Fighter Assault Frame Graves, play a different item build (recommended under Alt Builds) and go for Melt -> Grav Booster stacks.
Use this as the TFT Academy published line, not a merged consensus build.

overview.title: General info
lines: Invader Zed is listed around X-tier as Fast 9.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Situational comp played with Invader Zed augment. Your duo carry is very flexible since Zed has no traits. Can play Rammus / Gnar until you find Shen and Bard.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Play a standard win streak tempo opener. You can't aim to play this comp unless you specifically hit Zed's augments.
Stage 3: Build Zed items ASAP: Edge of Night > Shojin. Slam items on anyone to preserve HP while focusing on econ. We will be rolling hard on level 8.

early.title: Early Game Plan
lines: Play a standard win streak tempo opener. You can't aim to play this comp unless you specifically hit Zed's augments.

mid.title: Mid Game Plan
lines: Build Zed items ASAP: Edge of Night > Shojin. Slam items on anyone to preserve HP while focusing on econ. We will be rolling hard on level 8.

late.title: Additional comp tips
lines: Level to 8 and look for a 4 cost tank. Zed has no traits so be very flexible with front line / back line. Some ideas: 4 Vanguard + Zed, 5 NOVA + Zed, or any comp that plays Riven / Yi.
Situational comp played with Invader Zed augment. Your duo carry is very flexible since Zed has no traits. Can play Rammus / Gnar until you find Shen and Bard.
Use this as the TFT Academy published line, not a merged consensus build.

comps.title: Reach for the Stars Jax Reroll (TFT Academy)

overview.title: General info
lines: Reach for the Stars Jax Reroll is listed around X-tier as 2-Cost Reroll.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Best on 3* buff Stargazer Constellation. Take lots of item and econ augments to hit the board. Many games you won't be able to fully itemize both TF and Caitlyn in the back so only prioritize one of them.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Get Jax online with items ASAP and try to win streak if possible. If lose streak, you can look for an econ engine like Primordian / Timebreaker.
Stage 3: Level to 6 and roll for 2* Jax and the Stargazer NOVA board. Econ back up to 50g and slow roll for 3* Jax. Finish any 3* you can, but often you can't chase all of them at the same time.

overview.title: Levelling guide
lines: Level 6 at 3-2 - slow roll above 50 gold

overview.title: General info
lines: Stellar Combo Aatrox Reroll is listed around X-tier as 1-Cost Reroll.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Ideally played on 3* buff Stargazer. Always NOVA select Aatrox. Once you finish your core, push levels for NOVA or more Stargazer. NOVA provides Shred/Sunder built into trait.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Prioritize Aatrox BIS and aim for a win streak if possible, but don't level early. Aim for a NOVA + Stargazer setup.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Always play 6 Bastion. Aatrox provides Sunder with NOVA. Caitlyn 3 is luxury so if you are too behind in finding copies for her, push levels for Corki as your duo carry.

overview.title: General info
lines: Vertical Shepherd is listed around X-tier as 4-Cost Fast 8.
Key item or condition: Shepherd Emblem.

overview.title: When to make
lines: Best with Arbiter that scales Leblanc's AP. Late game, if your Arbiter is not good cap with Blitzcrank over Leona. Comp can use strong frontline emblems such as Vanguard, Voyager, or Arbiter Emblems. Play Mighty mech over Karma on level 8 if you find sona for 7 Shepherd, frontline is most important.

overview.title: How to play
lines: Stage 2: Play around early Arbiter opener, preferably one that scales AP. If you take econ Arbiter, ditch it late game for a better tank option. Always take Frying Pan when possible.
Stage 3: Level for 5 Shepherd when possible with Vanguards. Focus on econ management while preserving HP because we will roll heavily on level 8.

lines: Level 8 at 4-2 - roll for core board

mid.title: Mid Game Plan

late.title: Additional comp tips
